description:
any_key_spec (ir_typer.rs:238-249) scans all specs calling is_equiv(Descr::any()) per key element to find the all-any spec for a given FnId. is_equiv is a type-theoretic emptiness check — non-trivial. any_spec_for (ir_typer.rs:257-271) allocates a debug-format string per spec to pick a deterministic representative. Both are called in collect_diagnostics loops.

Add to ModuleTypes:
  pub any_key_specs: HashMap<FnId, usize>  // index into specs for the all-any key

Populate in type_module_pass when an all-any key is registered. any_key_spec and any_spec_for become a single HashMap lookup. Remove the linear scan and the is_equiv loop from both methods. Remove the format!("{:?}", key) string allocation from any_spec_for.
title: add any-key secondary index to ModuleTypes; remove O(n) is_equiv scans
